title: 祭りは準備が肝要ってな

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is upset when she realizes some of her
classmates think she transferred to Tracen
because she was too good for regional races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's determined to prove regional racers aren't
inferior to their central counterparts. But as she is
now, her claims will only fall on deaf ears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One becomes driven to make a real name for
herself, so people can't possibly ignore her when
she declares that the regionals are in no way
lesser than the central races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a new goal decided, we start training for
Inari One's junior year.
